name: Matrix Terminal Clock
description: Displays the current time in cyberpunk style in the terminal header.
author: Synth Dev

name: Rain Intensity Slider
description: Lets you adjust the matrix rain effect intensity and color.
author: Synth Dev

name: Code Statistics
description: Shows line counts, character counts, and file metrics for your project.
author: Neon Coder

name: Syntax Highlighter Pro
description: Enhanced syntax highlighting with 20+ language themes and custom color palettes.
author: Neon Coder

name: File Diff Viewer
description: Compare file versions side by side with highlighted changes and merge support.
author: Cypher Dev

name: Snippet Manager
description: Save, organize, and reuse code snippets across all your projects.
author: Synth Dev

name: Project Notes
description: Attach markdown notes and TODO lists to any project for quick reference.
author: Cypher Dev

name: Color Picker
description: Inline color picker for CSS values with hex, RGB, and HSL support.
author: Neon Coder

name: Terminal Themes
description: Custom terminal color schemes, fonts, and prompt styles for your console.
author: Synth Dev

name: Auto Formatter
description: Automatically format code on save with configurable Prettier rules.
author: Cypher Dev

name: Git Lens
description: Inline git blame annotations, commit history per line, and branch visualization.
author: Cypher Dev

name: Regex Lab
description: Interactive regex builder and tester with real-time match highlighting and capture groups.
author: Neon Coder

name: API Request Builder
description: Send HTTP requests, inspect responses, and save collections — a built-in Postman alternative.
author: Cypher Dev

name: JSON Tree Visualizer
description: Render JSON data as interactive collapsible trees with search and path copying.
author: Neon Coder

name: Markdown Live Preview
description: Split-pane markdown preview with cyberpunk-styled rendering and export to HTML/PDF.
author: Synth Dev

name: Hacker Typer Mode
description: Type random code with authentic hacking sound effects for presentations and fun.
author: Synth Dev

name: CRT Monitor Filter
description: Apply retro CRT scanline, phosphor glow, and screen curvature effects to the IDE.
author: Synth Dev

name: ASCII Art Generator
description: Convert text to ASCII art banners with multiple font styles for code comments and headers.
author: Neon Coder

name: Dependency Graph
description: Visualize your project's import/dependency tree as an interactive force-directed graph.
author: Cypher Dev

name: TODO/FIXME Scanner
description: Scan your codebase for TODO, FIXME, HACK, and BUG comments and list them in one panel.
author: Cypher Dev

name: Browser Extension Scaffold
description: Generate Chrome/Firefox extension boilerplate with manifest v3, popup, content scripts, and options page.
author: Cypher Dev

name: IDE Extension Creator
description: Scaffold new Cyberpunk Termux IDE extensions with the required API hooks and sandbox config.
author: Synth Dev

name: Neon Code Minimap
description: A glowing minimap sidebar showing a condensed view of your entire file with syntax colors.
author: Neon Coder

name: Cyber Keybinding Editor
description: Customize all keyboard shortcuts with a visual editor and import/export profiles.
author: Cypher Dev

name: Ambient Soundscapes
description: Play looping cyberpunk ambience — rain, synth drones, neon hum — while you code.
author: Synth Dev

name: Port Scanner Widget
description: Scan and display open local ports with service detection for quick debugging.
author: Cypher Dev

name: Base64 & Encoding Toolkit
description: Encode/decode Base64, URL, HTML entities, and JWT tokens inline in the editor.
author: Neon Coder

name: CSS Glitch Generator
description: Generate cyberpunk glitch text effects with customizable intensity, colors, and animation speed.
author: Synth Dev
